Query.SQL: SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , GA.REFERENCE AS "GA.REFERENCE" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , PY.BANK_NAME AS "PY.BANK_NAME" , PY.BANK_ACC_NO AS "PY.BANK_ACC_NO" , PY.BANK_SORT_CODE AS "PY.BANK_SORT_CODE" , PY.ACC_HOLDER AS "PY.ACC_HOLDER" , PY.BANK_INFO_1 AS "PY.BANK_INFO_1" , PY.BANK_INFO_2 AS "PY.BANK_INFO_2" , PY.GIRO_ACC_NO AS "PY.GIRO_ACC_NO" , PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_1 AS "PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_1" , PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_2 AS "PY.GIRO_TRANS_CODE_2" , PY.APACS_TRANS_CODE AS "PY.APACS_TRANS_CODE" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA , PARTY_TO_PARTY_RELATIONSHIP P2P , PARTIES P , PAYEES PY WHERE CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'CLAIMANT' AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = '1' AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P2P.PARTY_A_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND P2P.PARTY_A_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND P2P.PARTY_B_ROLE_CODE = 'NCP PAYEE' AND P.PARTY_ID = P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND GA.PARTY_ID = P2P.PARTY_B_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'NCP PAYEE' AND PY.PARTY_ID = P2P.PARTY_B_ID
